puzzleDescription: The system is flooded with files! You must build a scanner that iterates through an array of file paths. For every file, find the index of the dot ('.') and extract the extension. Constraint: Only print the extension if the total filename has more than 8 characters.
objective: Given an array 'files', use a loop to check each String. Find the dot index using .indexOf('.'). Extract the substring from that dot to the end. Only print it if the original string's length is > 8.
hints: Use 'files[i].indexOf(".")' to find where the extension starts dynamically.
The condition 'files[i].length() > 8' will filter out 'Data.txt' and 'Run.exe'.
The loop should run from 0 to 'files.length'.
